repair_history.diagnosis:
left and right sides of binary expression '<' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Comparison of opaque AADL type with real literal -> Replace Target_Speed with Target_Speed.val in all comparisons
mismatched input '=' expecting ':': Invalid AGREE syntax for constant declaration -> Change 'const max_accel = 40.0;' to 'const max_accel : real = 40.0;'
Couldn't resolve reference to 'const_tar_speed': Undeclared variable in AGREE annex -> Remove references to 'const_tar_speed' and rewrite guarantees using visible features
left side of binary expression '<=' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real': Comparison of opaque AADL type with real literal -> Replace Actual_Speed with Actual_Speed.val in all comparisons
left side of binary expression '-' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real': Subtraction of opaque AADL types -> Replace Actual_Speed with Actual_Speed.val in all expressions

line 17: Couldn't resolve reference to 'abs'.: abs function not recognized in AGREE context -> Replace abs(Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val)) with (Actual_Speed.val - pre(Actual_Speed.val)) and adjust the guarantee to use a direct comparison with max_accel
line 17: left and right sides of binary expression '<' are of type '<error>' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Expression type mismatch due to unresolved abs function -> Rewrite the acceleration limit expression to avoid abs and ensure type consistency
line 17: left side of binary expression '<' is of type '<error>' but must be of type'int' or 'real': Expression evaluation failed due to unresolved abs function -> Simplify the expression to use only valid AGREE constructs
line 31: 'Actual' and 'Actual_Speed' have incompatible classifiers.: Port reference mismatch in connection declaration -> Correct the connection to reference the correct port name
line 33: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.: Port type mismatch in connection declaration -> Ensure the connection uses matching port types
